overall.reason: Applicable gate failures, below-professional critical dimensions, and unresolved unit and group blockers survive. The strongest failures are nonhuman threat/psychology in Veyra, Nyxa's unearned age bypass, repeated prose-only facial contradictions, unclear villain reads, and convergence in stern faces, polished dark leather, and split-drape female costuming.

visible_face_evidence.want: The single eye under the bowed brow and the extended open hand demand acknowledgment rather than comfort.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: Downcast head and compressed mouth conceal the accusation that his suffering may be unnecessary.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: He presents the calcified body as the burden-bearing object and makes the viewer confront the debt.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The demand gesture converts martyrdom into coercion.

audience_and_intent_fit.evidence: Disgraced colossal penitent reads before angel or hero.

passes.finding: The twelve masters do not share one body plan.
No roster-wide repeated horns, wings, halos, or generic demon anatomy is present.
Dominant prop/anatomy classes are mostly distinct: arch, cocoon, ledger, siphon hand, bow, blade ring, brand, lectern plane, fist, ligament, flesh clamp, and rifle.
Luna preserves a controlled teal/plum color lane without glossy rainbow-crystal drift.

failures.finding: Humanoid face reads compress toward hard brows, tight mouths, scowls, or hauteur; the records name varied contradictions, but P003 visibly repeats sternness across Korath, Cashmere, Quillith, Kett, Luna, and Sable.

Cashmere and Kett materially converge on polished dark leather, straps, and hard specular highlights; this repeats the black-leather aisle the criteria explicitly rejects and misses the hard-matte anchor.
Cashmere, Quillith, and Luna repeat long split-drape/one-leg-reveal solutions, reducing the intended variety in feminine silhouettes and tease placement.

blockers.closure_condition: A new frozen master and same-master face crop must visibly show a target-directed sensory slit, asymmetric plate closure, possessive intent, and loss-of-freedom villain strategy without psychology prose.

blockers.effect: Fails horror_threat and deliberate_horror_exception; passive egg/armadillo read survives.
blockers.closure_condition: The unchanged master must read as hostile enclosing predator before neutral shell in full-size and 96 px blinded inspection while retaining Aegis/Bulwark identity.
Replace the triptych with three materially different outer envelopes, ledger relationships, weight distributions, and casting vectors, then preserve one selected option exactly in the master.

A same-master crop must visibly separate proprietary invitation from memory-blank panic through unequal eye focus, brow asymmetry, jaw tension, and mouth asymmetry rather than a generic aristocratic smirk.

blockers.effect: Fails the dry hard-matte finish audit and falls below professional in craft/distinctiveness.
blockers.closure_condition: A frozen Vellum-first comparison must show tobacco velvet, parchment, skin, ink, and metal as dry separated materials with no broad polished black-leather read or Vellum-costume imitation.

blockers.effect: Fails peak_age_fighter, deliberate_horror_exception, hot_adult_woman bypass, and lean_toned_feminine bypass.
blockers.closure_condition: A new frozen master must make batlike nonhuman predation and temporal body horror the first unprompted read before apparent age at face, full-body, and 96 px scales; otherwise Nyxa must satisfy the ordinary female lane.

blockers.effect: Fails selected-master correspondence and production trait clarity for the declared grown spine/wing-finger bow.
blockers.closure_condition: The selected-master silhouette must visibly preserve one continuous anatomical connection from Nyxa's spine or wing finger into the time-bow rather than depicting a separately gripped bow.
The same-master crop must visibly show courteous service and clinical collection simultaneously, plus concealed fear of unpriced care, without collapsing to a generic smug goblin.
A same-master crop and pose must visibly combine intimate approval, corrective ownership, genuine care, and fear of being surpassed rather than only hauteur.

The same-master face and body must show grievance held under rigid restraint, visible anticipatory relief at impact, and a target-directed villain strategy that cannot read as a neutral or heroic bruiser.

blockers.effect: Fails trait_channels, no-clutter, and dry hard-matte finish audits.
blockers.closure_condition: A new frozen master must keep the wage-stamp fist dominant, encode Cartel through stamped ownership scars rather than chain/coin/leather gangster shorthand, and render workwear and metal with dry non-polished material response.

The same-master face and pose must visibly show warm invitation to one side, surveillance of another, fear of direct comparison, and coercive delight so the first read is manipulative antagonist rather than neutral refractor mage.
The central same-master face must visibly show widened collapse panic and a demanding mouth, aligning with the clamp/clock strategy and no longer reading as a trapped sad victim.

blockers.effect: Fails dry hard-matte Vellum finish audit.
blockers.closure_condition: A frozen Vellum-first comparison must show dried oxblood, smoked sinew, cartilage, scab, and staples with controlled matte response and clearer hierarchy, without wet interior sheen.

The same-master crop must visibly distinguish cold moral satisfaction from a suppressed flicker of doubt, while pose/attention makes people into evidence rather than reading as a grim righteous sniper.
A fresh same-master face board must let blinded reviewers distinguish each documented emotion family and contradiction without defaulting the affected humanoids to sternness, scowl, or hauteur.

blockers.effect: Fails shared black-leather and hard-matte convergence audit.
blockers.closure_condition: The Vellum-first board must show Cashmere and Kett as different garment/material families with no shared polished black-leather aisle and no broad hard specular finish.

A fresh role-grouped master board must show materially different feminine garment families and appeal placement for Cashmere, Quillith, and Luna rather than repeating long split drapes and one-leg exposure.

rejected_findings.finding: Korath requires conventional armor to pass as a tank.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: His giant load-bearing body, calcification, and fused reliquary architecture visibly explain frontline protection; armor is not required.

rejected_findings.finding: Veyra fails because it lacks carried armor or a shield.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: Nested shell anatomy is a valid protection solution; the actual failure is passive non-villainous presentation.

rejected_findings.finding: Creep's absent mouth automatically invalidates face psychology.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: The criteria permits a deliberate nonhuman mechanism; erased face, hollow eyes, head cant, and predatory pose jointly carry the read.

rejected_findings.finding: Nyxa is not threatening at all.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: The lethal bow, clawed crouch, target fixation, and predatory delight pass threat; the narrower failure is that age reads before batlike nonhuman horror, so the bypass is unearned.

rejected_findings.finding: Sable must satisfy hot-adult-woman and feminine gates.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: Sable is explicitly nonbinary androgynous; those gates are not applicable.

rejected_findings.finding: Luna needs armor to look combat-capable.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: Mage role and ligament control do not justify armor; the failure is villain/threat psychology, not protection.

rejected_findings.finding: The group repeats horns, wings, halos, or one demon anatomy.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: The role-grouped master board shows no such roster-wide repetition.

rejected_findings.finding: Vellum should be copied as the preferred costume template.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: The approved hard-matte Vellum is a material/detail benchmark, and copying its leather/paper costume is itself convergence failure.

protected_dissent.finding: Nyxa's deliberate-horror exception is not earned by the frozen master.
protected_dissent.protection_reason: The face crop's first read is elderly humanoid; lethal intent does not by itself satisfy the stricter monster-before-age condition.

protected_dissent.finding: Veyra's slit and wound do not constitute readable active psychology or villain intent.
protected_dissent.protection_reason: The master remains symmetric, static, and sealed, matching the packet's own forbidden neutral-egg/armadillo read.

protected_dissent.finding: Cashmere's rough triptych is not three genuinely distinct silhouette possibilities.
protected_dissent.protection_reason: All three preserve the same upright feminine body, ledger block, and long split-drape envelope with only placement changes.

protected_dissent.finding: Luna does not visibly read as a villain or scary antagonist.
protected_dissent.protection_reason: The stern face, stop-palm, and clean diagonal ligament support a disciplined mage, but not coercive triangulation or fear.

protected_dissent.finding: The group face board still converges on sternness despite varied written psychology.
protected_dissent.protection_reason: P003 visibly compresses multiple humanoids into hard brows and tight mouths; prose labels cannot clear that convergence.
